product_overview: Ecosera is a mobile-first Progressive Web App MVP that surfaces locally-sourced products and sellers in a simple catalog-style experience optimized for low-digital-literacy users. Buyers browse and place orders by opening WhatsApp chats with sellers; the founder uses a protected admin interface to manage sellers, products, and analytics.
core_goals: Provide an extremely simple, mobile-first browsing experience for rural buyers with minimal friction
Enable fast product discovery via a prominent search bar and curated homepage content
Facilitate purchases using WhatsApp as the checkout channel (no in-app payments or buyer accounts)
Give the founder a secure admin interface to CRUD sellers/products/marketing and to view lightweight analytics

features.name: Homepage
features.description: Mobile-first landing page featuring a prominent search bar, featured categories, banners, regional picks, and product listings to quickly surface local goods.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See prominent search bar and featured banners -> Tap a featured category -> See product listing for that category -> Tap a ProductCard -> Navigate to /product/:id
Navigate to / -> See loading spinner for banners -> API returns error -> Show error banner 'Unable to load content' and provide Retry button

features.name: Product Search
features.description: Full-text search interface that returns matching products and logs search keywords for analytics.
user_flows: Navigate to /search -> Fill search input with "beras" -> Click Search button -> See list of search results -> Tap a result -> Navigate to /product/:id
Navigate to /search -> Leave search input empty -> Click Search button -> See validation message 'Please enter a search term' OR show empty results state

features.name: Product Detail
features.description: Product page with images, description, price, seller information, related products, reviews, and a primary 'Order via WhatsApp' CTA that opens WhatsApp with a pre-filled message.
user_flows: Navigate to /product/123 -> See product images, price, and seller info -> Click 'Order via WhatsApp' button -> App logs whatsapp_click event -> Browser redirects to seller's https://wa.me/ URL with pre-filled message -> See WhatsApp open to chat with seller

Navigate to /product/123 -> See product details -> Click 'Order via WhatsApp' button -> Seller has no whatsapp number or number invalid -> Show error message 'Seller contact not available' and do not redirect

features.name: Seller Shop
features.description: A seller storefront page listing all products for a particular local seller along with seller profile and contact info.
user_flows: Navigate to /seller/abc -> See seller header with name and WhatsApp contact -> Scroll product grid -> Tap a product -> Navigate to /product/:id
Navigate to /seller/unknown -> API returns 404 or seller inactive -> Show 'Seller not found' or 'Seller is not active' message and link back to homepage

features.name: Etalase (Catalog)
features.description: Category-based browsing page where users can explore products by category (catalog/etalase).
user_flows: Navigate to /etalase -> See list of categories -> Tap a category -> See products filtered by that category -> Tap a product -> Navigate to /product/:id
Navigate to /etalase -> Tap a category with no products -> See empty-state 'No products in this category' and suggestion to try another category

features.name: Cart
features.description: Client-side saved-items list (client-only cart) that stores items locally for later ordering; each item is ordered individually via WhatsApp.
user_flows: Navigate to /product/123 -> Click 'Save to Cart' button -> See confirmation 'Saved to cart' -> Navigate to /cart -> See saved item in list -> Click 'Order via WhatsApp' for that item -> App logs whatsapp_click event -> Redirect to seller's https://wa.me/ URL

Navigate to /cart -> See saved item -> Tap 'Order via WhatsApp' -> API logs click -> Redirect fails because product was removed from catalog -> Show error 'Item no longer available' and remove item from cart

features.name: Wishlist
features.description: Client-side wishlist for favoriting products and returning to them later without requiring an account.
user_flows: Navigate to /product/123 -> Click 'Add to Wishlist' icon -> See toast 'Added to wishlist' -> Navigate to /wishlist -> See product listed -> Click product -> Navigate to /product/:id
Navigate to /product/123 -> Click 'Add to Wishlist' -> Browser storage is full or blocked -> Show error 'Unable to save item' and suggest enabling storage or retrying

features.name: E-Learning
features.description: Educational modules that provide community knowledge sharing; module list and per-module detail pages are available.
user_flows: Navigate to /e-learning -> See list of modules -> Tap a module -> Navigate to /modules/:id -> See module content and lessons
Navigate to /e-learning -> Tap a module -> Navigate to /modules/:id -> Module content fails to load due to network error -> Show 'Unable to load module' with Retry option

features.name: Admin Authentication
features.description: Protected admin login portal for the founder using Supabase authentication to access private admin routes.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/login -> Fill email field with admin email -> Fill password field -> Click Login button -> Supabase authenticates -> Redirect to /admin dashboard

Navigate to /admin/login -> Fill email with wrong-email@example.com -> Fill password with wrong password -> Click Login button -> Supabase returns authentication error -> Show 'Invalid credentials' message and remain on /admin/login

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Private analytics view showing top products, search keywords, WhatsApp click metrics, most-viewed products, and seller performance.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> (ProtectedRoute allows access) -> See dashboard widgets: top clicked products, top searches, seller performance -> Click a top product -> Navigate to /admin/products/:id/edit
Navigate to /admin -> (ProtectedRoute blocks access for unauthenticated user) -> Redirect to /admin/login and show message 'Please log in to continue'

features.name: Admin Shop Management
features.description: CRUD interface for seller profiles including name, WhatsApp number, logo, description, and active status.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/shops -> Click 'New Shop' -> Navigate to /admin/shops/new -> Fill seller name -> Fill WhatsApp number -> Upload logo image -> Click Save -> See seller listed on /admin/shops
Navigate to /admin/shops/new -> Fill seller name -> Leave WhatsApp number empty -> Click Save -> Show validation error 'WhatsApp number is required' and prevent save

features.name: Admin Product Management
features.description: CRUD interface for managing products (images, price, category, seller relationship, description, featured flag).
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/products -> Click 'New Product' -> Navigate to /admin/products/new -> Fill product name -> Select seller -> Select category -> Upload product image -> Enter price -> Click Save -> See product appear in /admin/products and on the public site under the selected seller
Navigate to /admin/products/new -> Fill product name -> Upload invalid image format -> Click Save -> Show validation error 'Unsupported image format' and prevent product creation

features.name: Admin Marketing
features.description: Management of homepage banners and promotional content (create, edit, and remove banners shown on the public homepage).
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/marketing -> Click 'New Banner' -> Navigate to /admin/marketing/new -> Upload banner image -> Enter link or target product -> Click Save -> See banner appear in /admin/marketing list and on public homepage banners
Navigate to /admin/marketing/new -> Click Save without uploading an image -> Show validation error 'Banner image required' and do not save

features.name: Admin Trending
features.description: Admin interface to manage the trending / sought-after products that appear in a highlighted homepage section.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/trending -> See current trending list -> Click 'Add Trending' -> Select product from product list -> Click Save -> See product added to trending list and reflected on homepage
Navigate to /admin/trending -> Attempt to add a product that was deleted -> Show error 'Selected product not found' and do not add

features.name: Homepage
features.description: Walmart-inspired mobile-first landing page with search bar, featured categories, banners, pilihan daerah (regional picks), and product listings

features.name: Product Search
features.description: Full-text product search with keyword tracking and results display

features.name: Product Detail
features.description: Product detail page with images, descriptions, pricing, seller info, related products, reviews, and WhatsApp order CTA button

features.name: Seller Shop
features.description: Dedicated seller storefront page showing all products from a specific seller

features.name: Etalase (Catalog)
features.description: Category-based product browsing and catalog display

features.name: Cart
features.description: Client-side shopping cart for saved items with WhatsApp order functionality

features.name: Wishlist
features.description: Client-side wishlist for saving favorite products

features.name: E-Learning
features.description: Educational content modules for community knowledge sharing

features.name: Admin Authentication
features.description: Secure admin login portal for the founder using Supabase authentication

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Analytics dashboard showing top products, search keywords, WhatsApp click metrics, and seller performance

features.name: Admin Shop Management
features.description: CRUD operations for managing seller shops including name, WhatsApp number, logo, and description

features.name: Admin Product Management
features.description: CRUD operations for managing products per seller including images, pricing, categories, and descriptions

features.name: Admin Marketing
features.description: Banner and promotional content management for the homepage

features.name: Admin Trending
features.description: Management of trending/sought-after products display

known_limitations.issue: No automated tests exist in the codebase
known_limitations.impact: No test coverage for any features

known_limitations.issue: Admin routes rely on client-side route protection only
known_limitations.impact: Security depends on Supabase backend auth enforcement
